description_long: This house features a modern, rectilinear design with clean lines and a flat roof, set on a landscaped green plot with stylized trees. The structure is composed of multiple interlocking rectangular volumes, creating a dynamic, multi-level appearance. Large windows and open terraces are visible, suggesting an emphasis on natural light and outdoor connectivity. The front includes a prominent entryway with steps leading up to a covered porch area, while the rear and sides reveal additional balconies and overhangs. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray with contrasting dark brown deck surfaces and white railings. The surrounding landscape is minimalistic, with geometric lawns and a paved driveway.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, large windows, and open terraces, set on a landscaped plot with stylized trees and geometric lawns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, a covered porch, and a large tree to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered structure, multiple terraces, and the driveway leading to the house.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back terraces, elevated decks, and a tree at the rear corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the long, horizontal roofline and the minimalistic landscaping with trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and horizontal strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a covered porch, and a minimalist overhang
